title: AFKFish
body: ### Description This mod will automatically reel in the line and cast the fishing rod when you catch a fish. Just cast the rod into the water once and let the mod do the rest. _From version 1.21.11, I think I need to add more languages ​​to better suit everyone, and I plan to expand the mod to more platforms besides Fabric. This 0.15 update has been rebuilt twice before I could send it to you. I hope you will help me develop it further!_
